overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character running through a neon-lit futuristic city at dusk. The scene features wet reflective streets, heavy neon signage including 'BD SHACK' and 'EMBERACHI', palm trees, and moderate futuristic vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian crosswalk under neon-lit overpass

events.description: character begins running forward from a stopped position at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: standing at a crosswalk under a green neon overpass, then beginning to run forward

illuminated hotel sign with Japanese characters
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings
sleek silver futuristic vehicle with glowing accents

segments.scene_description: The character stands at a crosswalk under a green neon-lit overpass in a futuristic city. After a brief pause, they begin running forward along the wet concrete sidewalk as futuristic vehicles pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade with green neon lighting

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the covered walkway under continuous green neon lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt standing near the railing

entered.detail: continuous green neon tube lighting along the ceiling of the walkway
metal railing separating sidewalk from street traffic
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dusky sky

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a covered waterfront promenade illuminated by green neon lights. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the right while palm trees line the left side against a dusky sky, and the wet pavement reflects the vibrant lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with red neon commercial signage

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from green to red as character approaches the large BD SHACK neon sign
character crosses the multi-lane street at the marked crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: running across a busy intersection while navigating around other pedestrians and waiting for traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic white sedan driving along the street parallel to the crosswalk

entered.detail: large vertical red neon sign with 'BD SHACK' text on building facade
wide pedestrian crosswalk with yellow stripes across multi-lane road
tall traffic signal pole with red light illuminated

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into an open intersection dominated by a large red 'BD SHACK' neon sign. The lighting shifts dramatically from green to red as they cross the busy street among other pedestrians while futuristic vehicles navigate the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with commercial neon signage and elevated highway

events.description: character briefly slows to navigate around pedestrians on the crowded sidewalk

agents.ego_description: running along the sidewalk past the BD SHACK building and other commercial establishments with neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking in the same direction ahead of the character

entered.detail: elevated highway structure with glowing blue accent lights spanning across the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character continues running along the wet sidewalk past the BD SHACK building, with an elevated highway visible in the distance. Futuristic cars drive by on the right while the character navigates through scattered pedestrians on the reflective pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade under EMBERACHI sign

events.description: passing under the large EMBERACHI neon sign structure into a more covered waterfront area

agents.ego_description: running under covered overpasses along the waterfront, passing benches and railings

entered.detail: large white illuminated sign with 'EMBERACHI' text on building facade
series of concrete overpasses with integrated lighting covering the walkway
metal railing along the edge of the waterfront promenade
illuminated bench with blue lighting underneath

segments.scene_description: The character runs under a series of covered overpasses featuring a large 'EMBERACHI' neon sign. The scene transitions to a more enclosed waterfront promenade with benches and railings visible on the left, while traffic continues on the right and the sky darkens further.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic city, transitioning from a green-hued waterfront promenade into a vibrant red commercial district before ending in a darkened urban corridor. It begins at a crosswalk under a green neon overpass, where the character starts running along a wet concrete sidewalk as futuristic vehicles stream past. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a covered promenade lined with palm trees and reflective pavement, before emerging into an open intersection where the lighting dramatically transforms from green to red under a massive BD SHACK neon sign. The camera then follows the character past the BD SHACK building and toward a distant elevated highway, navigating through scattered pedestrians on the shimmering street. Finally, the environment becomes more enclosed as the character runs under a series of overpasses featuring a large EMBERACHI sign, passing waterfront benches and railings while the dusky sky darkens further.
